intended_use: The MAGNETOM MR system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces transverse, sagittal, coronal and oblique cross-sectional images that display, depending on o
intended_use_full: The MAGNETOM MR system is indicated for use as a magnetic resonance diagnostic device (MRDD) that produces transverse, sagittal, coronal and oblique cross-sectional images that display, depending on optional local coils that have been configured with the system, the internal structure and/or function of the head, body or extremities. Other physical parameters derived from the images may also be produced. Depending on the region of interest, contrast agents may be used. These images and the physical parameters derived from the images when interpreted by a trained physician or dentist trained in MRI yield information that may assist in diagnosis. The MAGNETOM MR system may also be used for imaging during interventional procedures when performed with MR-compatible devices such as MR Safe biopsy needles.
target_condition: General MRI diagnostic imaging across multiple anatomical regions
ground_truth: Acquired datasets represent ground truth; input test data created retrospectively from ground truth via data manipulation and augmentation including k-space undersampling, noise addition, and k-space mirroring
other_metrics: Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR) - significantly better in Deep Resolve reconstruction vs. conventional reconstruction; Structural Similarity Index (SSIM) - significantly better structural similarity in Deep Resolve reconstruction vs. conventional reconstruction and gold standard; Visual evaluation confirmed higher SNR and superior sharpness with no artifacts introduced by Deep Resolve reconstruction
